# bc-ai--ecosystem-map

> a living map of who's actually doing AI in British Columbia, search by region, sector, or tech focus to find collaborators fast.

this repo is the BC + AI ecosystem map: a searchable directory of the companies, labs, research groups, and community projects doing AI across British Columbia. it's backed by a Notion database with data-enhancement tooling, and ships a Next.js front end for browsing. maintained by Kris Krüg / BC + AI. there is no public hosted version yet; you run it from a checkout.

## key files
- [README](README.md): what it is, what it does, how to run it locally
- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): how agents should operate in this repo
- `ui/`: Next.js front end for the map
- `tools/`: data enhancement and analysis scripts (Notion-backed)
- `CONTRIBUTING.md`: how to add an organization or correct a record

## ground truth
- backing store is a Notion database; tools need NOTION_TOKEN and NOTION_DATABASE_ID, set as env vars, never committed
- org counts and coverage figures in the repo README are maintainer self-reported and dated; re-verify before quoting
- language: JavaScript

## links
- author: Kris Krüg · https://kriskrug.co
- community: BC + AI · https://bc-ai.ca
- source: https://github.com/WalksWithASwagger/bc-ai--ecosystem-map
